[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 0000000010 1
1 0100100000 2
2 1000000001 2
3 0000101000 2
4 0000000010 1
5 1101100011 6
6 0000101001 3
7 0000000000 a

01 10 0000000101 2
12 21 0000000000 a match 7
23 32 0010000010 2
34 43 1010101001 5
45 54 1000101000 3
56 65 0000000000 a match 7
67 76 0000010000 1
70 07 0001000000 1

13 31 0000101001 3 match 6
24 42 0010000000 1
35 53 1000101000 3
46 64 0000000001 1
57 75 0001100000 2
60 06 0000000011 2
71 17 0000100000 1

14 41 0000101001 3 match 6
25 52 0000000000 a match 7
36 63 0000000011 2
47 74 0000100000 1
50 05 1001000000 2
61 16 0000000001 1
72 27 0000000000 a match 7

04 40 1000000001 2 match 2
15 51 0000101000 2 match 3
26 62 0000000010 1 match 0 4
37 73 0100100000 2 match 1
